summary: Security Audit (P1) testing completed for KOLOR STUDIO CRM. All 10 test cases PASSED covering: 1) Audit logging (lead deletion creates audit entry), 2) GDPR account deletion (wrong password 401, correct password 200, missing password 400), 3) Password reset hardening (short password rejection, weak password rejection, invalid token handling), 4) Settings Modal Account tab with Danger Zone UI. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified via Playwright.

issues: Minor chart width warning in console (non-blocking): 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'

passed_tests: Audit Log: DELETE lead creates audit entry - POST /api/leads then DELETE /api/leads/:id succeeds
Account Deletion: DELETE /api/user/account without password returns 400
Account Deletion: DELETE /api/user/account with wrong password returns 401
Account Deletion: DELETE /api/user/account with correct password returns 200 and account is deleted
Password Reset: POST /api/auth/reset-password with short password (<8 chars) returns 400
Password Reset: POST /api/auth/reset-password with weak password ('password') returns 400
Password Reset: POST /api/auth/reset-password with invalid token returns 400 'Invalid Token'
Settings Modal: Account tab renders with Danger Zone section (data-testid='danger-zone')
Settings Modal: Clicking 'Delete My Account' reveals confirmation form with password input
Settings Modal: Confirmation form has Cancel and Delete Forever buttons with correct testids
Landing page renders correctly with all 6 sections (Hero, Problem, Solution, How It Works, Pricing, CTA)
critical_code_review_comments: auditService.ts properly logs userId, action, entity, entityId, metadata, ipAddress, userAgent
user.ts DELETE /api/user/account validates password before deletion, logs audit entry BEFORE cascade delete
auth.ts reset-password checks password length (>=8), rejects common weak passwords, prevents same password reuse
AccountDangerZone.tsx has all required data-testid attributes for testing
SettingsModal.tsx properly includes Account tab with data-testid='account-tab'
All interactive elements in Danger Zone have appropriate data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Created disposable test users for account deletion tests (auto-cleanup via deletion)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security Audit P1 features fully tested and working: audit logging, GDPR account deletion, password reset hardening. All backend APIs return correct status codes. Frontend Account tab in Settings Modal has Danger Zone with Delete My Account button that shows confirmation form with password input. All data-testid attributes present for testing.

audit_logging.DELETE_LEAD: Creates audit entry with userId, action, entity, entityId, metadata
audit_logging.ACCOUNT_DELETED: Logs before cascade delete with email and deletedAt timestamp
audit_logging.PASSWORD_RESET: Logs reset action with resetAt timestamp
